description: Show all available commands and their usage.
Enter Plan Mode to research and design before making changes.
Clear the terminal screen and visual session history.
View or manage project-specific memories (MEMORY.md).
List all current memory entries.
Switch between different AI models (e.g., Sonnet, Opus).
Show all available models you can switch to.
Show token usage, cost, and session statistics.
Revert the session to a previous checkpoint or state.
Manage custom slash commands.
List all active custom and built-in commands.
Reload custom command definitions from .toml files.
View available tools and their current status.
List all tools the agent has access to.

Display current configuration settings.
View or manage your conversation history.
Show a list of previous turns in this session.
Wipe the conversation history for the current session.
Report a bug or provide feedback to the developers.
Reset the current session to its initial state.
Save the current session state to a file.
Open a file or directory in your default application.
Open a specific file for editing within the CLI.
Perform a web search or codebase search.
Fetch and analyze content from a specific URL.
Show detailed token breakdown for the last message.
Show current agent status and active tasks.
Check for updates to the Gemini CLI.
Show the current version of Gemini CLI.
Toggle voice input/output mode (if supported).
Start a fresh chat-focused session.
View the internal execution logs for debugging.
Ask a quick question without full context.

Alias for /quit. Terminate the session.
